title: Gzin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image=[[File:Gzin1.jpg]] |name=Gzin |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]] {{C|presumably}}[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] |species=[[Unidentified species (Golden Nyss Shipyards)|Four-armed species]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height=Around 1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] |mass= |hair=None |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|White]] |skin=Light blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Golden Nyss Shipyards]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Whatchoo got coming in, Grahrk?''"
"''Five ships fulla bombad crazy soldiers to take over shipyards and steal your ships!''"
"''Yes. Very funny, Grahrk. I'm dying laughing, har-har.|Gzin and Vilmarh Grahrk|}} '''Gzin''' was the [[Unidentified species (Golden Nyss Shipyards)|four-armed]] Shipyard Master of the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]] during the final decade of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] incited the reptilian species known as the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] to launch an aggressive [[Yinchorri Uprising|expansion]] beyond [[Yinchorri system|their system]]. Grahrk’s plan involved seizing one of the Golden Nyss shipyards, so he secretly loaded his [[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|starship]] with a crowd of armed Yinchorri, declaring in the cargo manifest that he was transporting «live food replenishment». As he approached the station, Gzin contacted him to inquire about the cargo. The [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] truthfully revealed the plan, but Gzin dismissed it as just another joke. Shipyard Master Gzin assigned Grahrk an empty hangar and ended the transmission. Unfortunately for the shipyard overseer, Vilmarh had been telling the truth. The Yinchorri [[Raid on the Golden Nyss Shipyards|massacred]] the personnel, seized all docked ships, and then destroyed the shipyards. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Gzin }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Businesspeople]]
